=== empty
# TextArea with no content — all lines show dot placeholders.
widget: textarea
width: 22
height: 5
===
╔════════════════════╗
║[··················]║
║[··················]║
║[··················]║
╚════════════════════╝

=== with_lines
# TextArea with two lines of text.
widget: textarea
width: 22
height: 5
lines: Hello, world!
lines: Second line.
===
╔════════════════════╗
║[Hello, world!·····]║
║[Second line.······]║
║[··················]║
╚════════════════════╝

=== cursor_mid
# TextArea cursor on second row, mid-column.
widget: textarea
width: 22
height: 5
lines: First line
lines: Second line
cursor_row: 1
cursor_col: 3
===
╔════════════════════╗
║[First line········]║
║[Second line·······]║
║[··················]║
╚════════════════════╝

=== overflow_scroll
# TextArea with more lines than visible height — shows first 3 lines (cursor at row 0).
widget: textarea
width: 22
height: 5
lines: Line one
lines: Line two
lines: Line three
lines: Line four
lines: Line five
===
╔════════════════════╗
║[Line one··········]║
║[Line two··········]║
║[Line three········]║
╚════════════════════╝
